summary: Dan Shapiro shares a lighthearted Halloween post about carving a political jack-o-lantern using his woodworking chisels. He playfully hedges on the political nature of the pumpkin by offering two interpretations depending on the viewer's political leanings. The post is a brief, humorous personal entry from 2004 with no substantive argument or thesis.
key_points: Shapiro repurposed his new woodworking chisels to carve a political jack-o-lantern
He frames the carved pumpkin as either an homage or a scary Halloween creation depending on the viewer's politics
The post links to a guide on advanced pumpkin carving techniques
money_quotes: If you're a supporter of the current administration, please regard this as an homage to our president.
If not, please regard this as the scariest jack-o-lantern that I was capable of carving.
key_insight: A playful Halloween post about pumpkin carving with political overtones, offering no substantive business or technology insight.
